prompt: A cinematic, ultra-realistic golden-hour equestrian portrait of a {argument name="horse color" default="dark bay"} horse and a {argument name="rider gender" default="young man"} standing closely together in a quiet outdoor paddock at sunset. The horse is tall and elegant, shown from the chest up in three-quarter view, with a glossy coat, long dark mane, alert upright ears, and a black leather bridle and reins; part of an English saddle is visible on the left side of the frame. The rider wears a fitted {argument name="rider outfit" default="black long-sleeve riding shirt and black riding pants"}, standing on the right side of the horse, leaning in with one hand gently cupping the horse’s cheek and muzzle in a tender, intimate pose. Compose the image as a close portrait with the horse dominating the left half and the rider on the right, their faces nearly touching, emphasizing emotional connection and trust. Set the scene in a fenced field with softly blurred wooden rails, distant rolling hills, and a glowing orange sky with the sun low on the horizon. Use warm backlighting, rich amber highlights, realistic skin and fur texture, shallow depth of field, premium advertisement-style photography, natural shadows, high contrast, and a polished luxury editorial look. The overall mood should be affectionate, serene, and sophisticated, like a high-end lifestyle ad for equestrian fashion or horse care.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影感十足、超写实的黄金时刻马术肖像，画面中是一匹 {argument name="horse color" default="深骝色"} 马和一位 {argument name="rider gender" default="年轻男性"} 在日落时分安静的户外围场中紧紧站在一起。马匹高大优雅，以四分之三侧面呈现胸部以上特写，毛发光亮，长长的深色鬃毛，耳朵警觉竖起，佩戴黑色皮革缰绳和挽具；画面左侧可见部分英式马鞍。骑手身穿合身的 {argument name="rider outfit" default="黑色长袖骑马衫和黑色马裤"}，站在马匹右侧，身体前倾，一只手温柔地托住马的脸颊和口鼻，姿态亲昵。构图采用近景肖像，马匹占据画面左半部分，骑手位于右侧，两人面部几乎相贴，强调情感连接与信任。场景设置在带有围栏的草场，背景是虚化的木质围栏、远处的连绵起伏的山丘，以及地平线上低垂的太阳所映照出的橙色天空。运用温暖的逆光、浓郁的琥珀色高光、逼真的皮肤和皮毛质感、浅景深、高级广告摄影风格、自然阴影、高对比度以及精致的奢华编辑感。整体氛围应充满温情、宁静且精致，如同马术时尚或马匹护理的高端生活方式广告。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华日落马术肖像：此提示词可生成一张写实且高级的广告风格肖像，描绘了骑手在日落时分轻拥佩戴缰绳的马匹，非常适合马术品牌推广或生活方式宣传活动。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
